Chinese mainland Olympians visited three community service centers and engaged with residents in the Macao Special Administrative Region (SAR) on the morning of September 2 as part of their three-day visit. Since the conclusion of the Sydney Olympic Games in 2000, it has been a tradition for mainland Olympians to visit Macao, immersing themselves in local social service organizations.
